title: Good links: 28 April 2024
summary: On having no visual memory - Rachel Andrew shares her experiences of what it’s like to have aphantasia. Why Good Captioned Videos Are Important – Meryl.net home - A really insightful guide to what makes good, accessible video captions. Plain is always better, folks!
content:
